column1: I’m not sure but he ____ be wrong.
Helen has no friends. She ____ be very lonely.
_____ these shoes cost so much money?
She _____ run very fast. She always wins.
Должно быть ты голоден, ты не ел 10 часов.

column2: You must be hungry, you haven’t eaten for 10 hours!
You can be hungry, you haven’t eaten for 10 hours!
You may be hungry, you haven’t eaten for 10 hours!

column1: Не может быть, чтобы ты был в школе сейчас.

column2: You may not be at school now.
You don't dare be at school now.

column1: Не может быть чтобы Майк опоздал на такое важное совещание.

column2: Mike may not have been late for such an important meeting
